title: Dark Inventory l Gazz
description: Translucent dark interface for comfortable gaming
body:
# Translucent inventory

I made my own version of the inventory that might be useful to someone.
**It's great for PVP and casual play.**
![Инвертарь](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3103cb9d195e879a8568e526e3cdc51152e48a03.png)![ИнвертарьВерстак](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9cd20914e8fb15d5b9137409de5b83113fa9308.png)![крИнвертарь](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3fcad2fff0224eb7cd70880afb9528047ecafad.png)

##  —— DESCRIPTION ——————————————————

ALSO, **this is part of my texture pack puzzle**, where you can disable unnecessary changes to suit your tastes.

### Here are the links to other interface icons you need.
